mapper.sql: warehouse_code, warehouse_name, warehouse_type, modelno, inventory_type_code, inventory_property_id, customer_no, ppl, project_code, group_customer_no, sales_info_no, qtyN, pqtyN, qtyW, pqtyW, qtyD, pqtyD, qtyC, pqtyC, qtyP, pqtyP, qtyR, pqtyR, qty_available, DeptCode, rqty_available, rflag
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.inventory_report
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.inventory_report (warehouse_code, warehouse_name, warehouse_type, modelno, inventory_type_code, inventory_property_id, customer_no, ppl, project_code, group_customer_no, sales_info_no, qtyN, pqtyN, qtyW, pqtyW, qtyD, pqtyD, qtyC, pqtyC, qtyP, pqtyP, qtyR, pqtyR, qty_available, DeptCode, rqty_available, rflag ) values (#{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{warehouseName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{warehouseType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inventoryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inventoryPropertyId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ppl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{projectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{groupCustomerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{salesInfoNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{qtyn,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{pqtyn,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{qtyw,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{pqtyw,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{qtyd,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{pqtyd,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{qtyc,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{pqtyc,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{qtyp,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{pqtyp,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{qtyr,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{pqtyr,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{qtyAvailable,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{deptcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rqtyAvailable,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{rflag,jdbcType=INTEGER} )

insert into dbo.inventory_report
warehouse_code,
warehouse_name,
warehouse_type,
modelno,
inventory_type_code,
inventory_property_id,
customer_no,
ppl,
project_code,
group_customer_no,
sales_info_no,
qtyN,
pqtyN,
qtyW,
pqtyW,
qtyD,
pqtyD,
qtyC,
pqtyC,
qtyP,
pqtyP,
qtyR,
pqtyR,
qty_available,
DeptCode,
rqty_available,
rflag,

#{warehouseName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
#{warehouseType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{inventoryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{inventoryPropertyId,jdbcType=BIGINT},

#{groupCustomerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{salesInfoNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

#{pqtyn,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{qtyw,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{pqtyw,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{qtyd,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{pqtyd,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{qtyc,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{pqtyc,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{qtyp,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{pqtyp,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{qtyr,jdbcType=INTEGER},

#{qtyAvailable,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{deptcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{rqtyAvailable,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{rflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
mapper.update:
update dbo.inventory_report
warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
warehouse_name = #{record.warehouseName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
warehouse_type = #{record.warehouseType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
modelno = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inventory_type_code = #{record.inventoryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inventory_property_id = #{record.inventoryPropertyId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
customer_no = #{record.customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ppl = #{record.ppl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
project_code = #{record.projectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
group_customer_no = #{record.groupCustomerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sales_info_no = #{record.salesInfoNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
qtyN = #{record.qtyn,jdbcType=INTEGER},
pqtyN = #{record.pqtyn,jdbcType=INTEGER},
qtyW = #{record.qtyw,jdbcType=INTEGER},
pqtyW = #{record.pqtyw,jdbcType=INTEGER},
qtyD = #{record.qtyd,jdbcType=INTEGER},
pqtyD = #{record.pqtyd,jdbcType=INTEGER},
qtyC = #{record.qtyc,jdbcType=INTEGER},
pqtyC = #{record.pqtyc,jdbcType=INTEGER},
qtyP = #{record.qtyp,jdbcType=INTEGER},
pqtyP = #{record.pqtyp,jdbcType=INTEGER},
qtyR = #{record.qtyr,jdbcType=INTEGER},
pqtyR = #{record.pqtyr,jdbcType=INTEGER},
qty_available = #{record.qtyAvailable,jdbcType=INTEGER},
DeptCode = #{record.deptcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
rqty_available = #{record.rqtyAvailable,jdbcType=INTEGER},
rflag = #{record.rflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},

update dbo.inventory_report set warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, warehouse_name = #{record.warehouseName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, warehouse_type = #{record.warehouseType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, modelno = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, inventory_type_code = #{record.inventoryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, inventory_property_id = #{record.inventoryPropertyId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, customer_no = #{record.customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ppl = #{record.ppl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, project_code = #{record.projectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, group_customer_no = #{record.groupCustomerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sales_info_no = #{record.salesInfoNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, qtyN = #{record.qtyn,jdbcType=INTEGER}, pqtyN = #{record.pqtyn,jdbcType=INTEGER}, qtyW = #{record.qtyw,jdbcType=INTEGER}, pqtyW = #{record.pqtyw,jdbcType=INTEGER}, qtyD = #{record.qtyd,jdbcType=INTEGER}, pqtyD = #{record.pqtyd,jdbcType=INTEGER}, qtyC = #{record.qtyc,jdbcType=INTEGER}, pqtyC = #{record.pqtyc,jdbcType=INTEGER}, qtyP = #{record.qtyp,jdbcType=INTEGER}, pqtyP = #{record.pqtyp,jdbcType=INTEGER}, qtyR = #{record.qtyr,jdbcType=INTEGER}, pqtyR = #{record.pqtyr,jdbcType=INTEGER}, qty_available = #{record.qtyAvailable,jdbcType=INTEGER}, DeptCode = #{record.deptcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, rqty_available = #{record.rqtyAvailable,jdbcType=INTEGER}, rflag = #{record.rflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}
